A Special Delivery

✉️ A Special Delivery — Just For You, Dad

✨ Click the envelope to open

✨ Click the card to open it

🌸 Like cherry blossoms — beautiful, fleeting, unforgettable

For My Dad 💗

Dad, there are no words grand enough to hold everything you mean to me. You have been my foundation — steady, strong, and always present when the ground felt uncertain beneath my feet. Every lesson you've offered, whether spoken plainly or quietly lived by example, has shaped the person I am in ways I'm still discovering. The way you love without condition, give without hesitation, and show up before you're even asked — that is the kind of person I strive to be each day. Your sacrifices were never invisible. Your patience was never lost on me. And your love? It's the very reason I understand what it means to feel truly safe and truly seen in this world. Thank you for being my dad, my greatest example, and the quiet constant in every chapter of my life. I love you more than any letter, any song, or any cherry blossom in full bloom could ever express. 🌸

— Forever your child, with all my love 💌
